prestazioni: 3.6L Pentastar V6 (ERB engine code) forced induction via Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, 10.5psi boost, and custom 3.5" intercooler piping routed through the factory grille opening to a Mishimoto JEEP-specific front-mount intercooler (MMINT-JEEP-16FMI). Supporting mods include a ported and polished ERB intake manifold, upgraded fuel system with Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, and a Motec M150 ECU with custom calibration for 93 octane fuel and E85 flex-fuel capability.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: NV3550 transmission swap to a ZF 8HP70 8-speed automatic with a Level 10 torque converter (2,800 stall), paired with a Dana 44 AdvanTEK front axle (3.73 gears) and a Dana 60 rear axle (4.10 gears) with ARB Air Locker differentials. Axle shafts upgraded to Yukon Gear & Axle 35-spline chromoly units with CTM Racing U-joints.

Suspension overhaul: Fox 2.5 Factory Series DSC coilovers (24-way adjustable compression, 12-way rebound) with custom valving for Mojave-spec spring rates (600lb/in front, 450lb/in rear), paired with JKS Manufacturing adjustable front and rear sway bars (28mm front, 25mm rear). Chassis reinforcement via TeraFlex JK Unlimited Heavy-Duty Rock Sliders and a Currie Enterprises Anti-Rock front sway bar disconnect system.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a TeraFlex Mojave-spec Alpha HD fender flares (extended 3.5" per side) with trimmed inner fenders for 37x12.50R17 Nitto Trail Grappler M/T tires on Method MR701 beadlock wheels (17x9, +12mm offset). Front bumper replaced with a LoD Off-Road Mojave Edition bumper with integrated Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED pods and a Warn Zeon 12-S winch with synthetic rope.

Aerodynamic and functional upgrades: RK Sport Mojave-specific carbon fiber hood with functional heat extractor vents, paired with a custom rear spoiler from JCR Offroad (aluminum construction, adjustable angle). Underbody protection includes a TeraFlex JK HD skid plate system (aluminum, 0.25" thick) and a custom exhaust shield for the Borla Atak 3" cat-back exhaust system (stainless steel, dual 4" tips).

Interior and lighting: Full custom roll cage from Poison Spyder Customs (4-point, bolt-in, with harness bar) wrapped in Alcantara, paired with Sparco Pro 2000 seats (heated, with 6-point Schroth harnesses). Lighting upgrades include Oracle Lighting Dynamic ColorSHIFT LED fog lights (RGB, app-controlled) and a custom LED light bar integrated into the LoD rear bumper (Baja Designs S2 Sport, 20" width).
